trades.sentiment_summary: Omnicom has completed its $9 billion acquisition of Interpublic Group (IPG), closing the merger on November 26, 2025, and successfully exchanged 93.7% of IPG's $2.95 billion senior notes for new Omnicom notes, with settlement expected on December 2, 2025. The deal creates a combined entity with over $25 billion in annual revenue, positioning it as the world's leading marketing company. IPG stock closed at around $24.63-$26.12 on recent trading days, reflecting a delisting process post-acquisition.
